name: MOHIT GUPTA
title: Delivery Lead
bio: AI enthusiast Delivery Lead who turns strategy into measurable outcomes while working at the intersection of Product, Engineering & Commercial teams.

qaPairs.question: Tell me about yourself
qaPairs.answer: AI enthusiast Delivery Lead with more than 10 years of experience. I have completed my Bachelors from India and MBA from ESB university and then worked for few tech companies. I have recently been experimenting with AI and working on new ideas. My vision is to create products that provide an alternative perspective or help people in some way

qaPairs.question: What are your strengths?
qaPairs.answer: My biggest strengths are High agency and Growth mindset. I thrive in uncertainty and challenging projects. Even if I would not have all the information I would challenge myself to think from first principle and figure out ways to move forward considering the risk and rewards

qaPairs.question: How do you handle feedback or criticism?
qaPairs.answer: I have a growth mindset and appreciate any feedback. I would put myself in other's shoe and would try to think from their perspective why was the feedback provided, ask clarifying questions and make a plan to address the gap or how to handle the root cause of the perspection

qaPairs.question: How do you prioritize work?
qaPairs.answer: Prioritize work on critical path or something that would affect the key KPIS. Delegate where possible.

qaPairs.question: How do you handle conflict?
qaPairs.answer: Conflict is the way to have meaningful conversation. Conflict is another opportunity to align better. If there is a conflict we need to acknowledge there is a conflict, understand the other perspective and find a joint solution

qaPairs.question: What are your long-term career goals?
qaPairs.answer: Work on interesting AI products/projects that contribute to solving genuine problem
